title: xanthosoma cubense
intro: Xanthosoma cubense, also known as tannia or dasheen, is a type of starchy edible plant belonging to the Arum family. The leaves and corms of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of consuming Xanthosoma cubense include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, regulate blood sugar, and support digestive health. In herbal preparations, the plant's parts are often dried and ground into powder or made into tea, and it can also be used in soups and stews.
